statusCards.label: SCHEDULE
statusCards.description: Current milestone delivery is within planned dates. Next gate review: APR 2026.

statusCards.label: COST
statusCards.description: Execution within allocated budget. No variances exceeding threshold.

statusCards.label: PERFORMANCE
statusCards.description: Two integration points under review. Risk mitigation plans in place.

statusCards.label: RISK
statusCards.description: No critical risks currently open. Three medium risks actively managed.

budgetPerformance: Budget at Completion (BAC): Within contract ceiling
Actual Cost (AC): Tracking within 2% of planned spend
Cost Variance (CV): Favorable — no overruns identified
Cost Performance Index (CPI): 1.02 — slightly under budget
schedulePerformance: Milestones Met: MVP-1 on track for Mar 21, 2026
Next Review Gate: April 2026 Phase 1 kickoff
technicalPerformance: Tasks Complete: 4 of 7 Phase 0 tasks closed
Open Action Items: 6 tracked, 2 past due (in review)
Data Sources Connected: 3 of 6 priority sources

paragraphs: The CIM-ARC Data Fabric program continues to make steady progress through Phase 0. The team successfully delivered the MVP-1 demonstration on March 21, 2026, showcasing the core data ingestion pipeline, LAVA infrastructure integration, and the initial set of connected data sources. Stakeholder feedback was positive, with priority guidance received for Phase 1 scope prioritization.

Cost and schedule performance indices remain favorable (CPI: 1.02, SPI: 1.00). Three medium-level risks are being actively managed, with no critical risks open. The primary watch item is schema variability across source systems, which the engineering team is addressing through a Pydantic-based validation layer.
Phase 1 planning is underway. The program is on track for a formal Phase 1 kickoff in April 2026, contingent on network switch procurement and LAVA security accreditation package submission.

statusCards.label: CURRENT PHASE
statusCards.description: Foundation & MVP-1 delivery. Closing remaining Phase 0 action items.

statusCards.label: NEXT MILESTONE
statusCards.description: Phase 1 kickoff gate review and resource onboarding for expanded data integration.

statusCards.label: OVERALL STATUS
statusCards.description: Program health is green. No issues requiring escalation at this time.

resourceAllocation.notes: Nick Hertzberg currently serves as ISSM at 10% allocation. Chris Macabugao is onboarding and will assume the ISSM role from Nick at the end of 2026. Remaining team members have allocations pending Phase 1 scope confirmation and contract modification approval.

spendPlan.note: Values are notional and reflect Phase 0 period of performance. Updated as of March 2026.

technicalAccomplishments.title: MVP-1 Delivered (Mar 21, 2026)
technicalAccomplishments.description: End-to-end data ingestion pipeline demonstrated live to stakeholders, including real-time query and visualization on LAVA infrastructure.

technicalAccomplishments.title: LAVA Infrastructure Integration
technicalAccomplishments.description: Data Fabric environment successfully deployed on LAVA. System uptime maintained at 99.4% over Phase 0 period of performance.

technicalAccomplishments.title: 3 of 6 Priority Data Sources Connected
technicalAccomplishments.description: Connectors built and validated for three priority data sources. Schema normalization and transformation logic operational.

technicalAccomplishments.title: Pydantic Schema Validation Layer (Design Complete)
technicalAccomplishments.description: Architecture finalized for absorbing schema variability across heterogeneous data sources in Phase 1.

technicalAccomplishments.title: Security Architecture Reviewed
technicalAccomplishments.description: Initial security architecture documented; LAVA accreditation package in preparation for submission by Apr 4, 2026.

technicalAccomplishments.title: Data Catalog Prototype
technicalAccomplishments.description: Initial metadata catalog structure defined, enabling discoverability of ingested datasets across connected sources.

risks.title: Network Switch Procurement Lead Time
risks.impact: Schedule — Phase 1 start delay of up to 2 weeks
risks.mitigation: Alternative vendor sourced; order placed with expedited shipping. Monitoring weekly.

risks.title: Classified Facility Access Scheduling
risks.impact: Resource availability for two team members pending clearance
risks.mitigation: Interim unclassified work assignments identified. Clearance actions actively tracked.

risks.title: Data Source Schema Variability
risks.impact: Additional engineering effort for normalization in Phase 1
risks.mitigation: Pydantic-based schema validation layer being designed to absorb variability. Engineering reserve identified.

actionItems.title: Finalize data source connector specifications for Phase 1
Complete LAVA security accreditation package submission
MVP-1 demonstration script and stakeholder invitations
Submit contract modification for Phase 1 labor ceiling increase
Initiate Phase 1 hiring actions for ML and DevSecOps roles

planForward.title: Phase 0 Close-Out — Action Item Resolution
planForward.description: All open Phase 0 action items targeted for closure. Connector specifications finalized. Phase 0 lessons learned documented and briefed to leadership.

planForward.title: LAVA Security Accreditation Package Submission
planForward.description: Complete and submit the LAVA ATO package to the ISSO. This is a critical dependency for Phase 1 operational use of the secure enclave environment.

planForward.title: Phase 1 Gate Review & Kickoff
planForward.description: Formal review of Phase 1 readiness: contract mod, personnel onboarding, infrastructure availability, and data source roadmap. Contingent on network switch delivery and accreditation actions.

planForward.title: Phase 1 Personnel Onboarding
planForward.description: ML/Analytics Engineer and DevSecOps Engineer onboarded. Orientation, access provisioning, and integration into active workstreams.

planForward.title: Data Sources 4–6 Integration
planForward.description: Expand pipeline to remaining three priority data sources. Pydantic validation layer deployed. Full data catalog operational across all six sources.

planForward.title: Analytics Layer & Dashboard MVP
planForward.description: First analytical dashboards surfacing cross-domain insights delivered to end users. Initial ML model pipeline stood up for anomaly detection use case.

planForward.title: Phase 1 Review & Phase 2 Planning
planForward.description: Phase 1 performance review against KPIs. Scope definition and resource planning for Phase 2 expansion to additional data domains and stakeholder communities.
